hero.title: Feel the Rhythm of Kizomba
hero.subtitle: Learn the sensual and passionate dance from Angola

about.title: What is Kizomba?
about.description: Kizomba is an Angolan partner dance that emerged in the late 1980s. It blends traditional Angolan rhythms with Brazilian and Caribbean influences, creating a slow, sensual, and deeply musical dance form.

list.text: Small group classes for personalized attention

list.title: Beginners
list.description: New to kizomba? Learn the fundamentals of connection, basic steps, and rhythm. Perfect for dancers of any background.

list.title: Intermediate
list.description: Build on your foundations with more complex movements, styling, and partnering techniques. Grow your musicality.

list.title: Advanced
list.description: Master intricate techniques, advanced styling, and leading/following. For experienced dancers seeking to refine their craft.

list.title: Social Nights
list.description: Practice what you've learned in a relaxed, social atmosphere. Dance, connect, and enjoy the community.

list.author: Ioana M.
list.text: I came to Vaidoso knowing nothing about kizomba, and now I can't imagine my life without it. The instructors are incredibly patient and the community is so welcoming. Every class feels like a celebration!
list.mobile_text: Came knowing nothing, now it's my life! Best community ever.

list.author: Mihai C.
list.text: Finally found a place where I feel comfortable learning to dance. The authentic Angolan technique really makes a difference. Highly recommended for anyone wanting to learn real kizomba!
list.mobile_text: Real authentic technique. Found my dance family here!

list.author: Elena P.
list.text: The social nights are amazing! It's the perfect place to practice, meet new dancers, and just enjoy the music. Vaidoso has become my second home. So grateful for this community!
list.mobile_text: Social nights are amazing! Vaidoso is my second home.

list.author: Alexandru B.
list.text: I took the intermediate class and learned more in one month than I expected. The instructors really care about each student's progress. This is the real deal!
list.mobile_text: Learned more in one month than expected. The real deal!
